existing_features.title: Remove the Industry Growth input field/section from the Company Snapshot form so users can no longer view or edit an industry growth value.

Remove Industry Growth from the shareable-link (URL query parameter) encoding/decoding so generated links no longer include an industry growth parameter and parsing ignores any existing industry growth parameter without breaking.
Update the output calculations and Output Values UI copy so Industry Growth is not included anywhere in the Actual Value computation or its displayed formula/description.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove the "industry growth" section from the product/output

projectName: Remove Industry Growth section from inputs and outputs
